# Obsidian fileManager.processFrontMatter — Shim Validation Capture
#
# Producer: .planning/phases/21-v1-2-migration/21-02-PLAN.md Task 4 Test 7
#   Live dev-vault probe (Plan 21-02 axis 2). Captured during /gsd-verify-work
#   for Phase 21, executed interactively with the human runner.
#
# Capture method:
#   1. Authored synthetic v1.2 fixture at <dev-vault>/leetcode/test-shim-capture.md
#      with frontmatter { lc-slug: shim-capture-test } (NO lc-language) and
#      body: '## Code\n\n```python\ndef solve(): pass\n```\n'.
#   2. Snapshotted pre-migration bytes to /tmp/test-shim-capture.before.md.
#   3. Opened the note in live Obsidian (autoMigrateOnOpen=ON, default
#      language=java); migrateLegacyFenceIfNeeded ran the auto-on path:
#      fence opener rewritten + lc-language injected.
#   4. cat <dev-vault>/leetcode/test-shim-capture.md > /tmp/obsidian-actual.txt
#      (post-migration bytes, 103 bytes).
#   5. Ran the same applyFrontmatterMutation logic + fence-rewrite regex from
#      tests/fixtures/migration/index.test.ts against the pre-migration text;
#      output captured in /tmp/shim-output.txt (103 bytes).
#   6. diff /tmp/obsidian-actual.txt /tmp/shim-output.txt → empty.
#
# Result:
   capture_date: 2026-06-01T19:06:45Z
   obsidian_plugin_version: 1.0.1
   default_language_setting: java
   pre_migration_bytes: 77
   post_migration_bytes: 103
   shim_output_bytes: 103
   shim_validation: captured
   DIFF: empty
#
# Resume signal for Plan 21-02 axis 2: shim_validation=captured.
# Plan 21-04 Task 3 BLOCKER 4 acceptance criterion satisfied:
#   test -f tests/fixtures/migration/.obsidian-shim-validation.txt → ok
#   grep -q '^   DIFF: empty' tests/fixtures/migration/.obsidian-shim-validation.txt → ok
#
# Byte-level frontmatter layout produced by Obsidian (and matched by shim):
#   ---\nlc-slug: shim-capture-test\nlc-language: java\n---\n\n
#   (newly-injected key appended at end of frontmatter block, single blank
#   line after closing delimiter, body bytes preserved verbatim).
